summary: First-iteration end-to-end test of CENTLY (React + FastAPI + MongoDB). Backend pytest suite: 28/28 passed (100%) covering health, products, categories, journal, newsletter, contact, consultation, mock orders, auth login/me, admin protected routes (401/200 matrix). Frontend Playwright run: home, collection, product detail, add-to-cart, checkout (mock Razorpay) + redirect to /order-confirmed, admin login, and all 5 admin tabs (orders/products/newsletter/contact/consultations) all working. Razorpay is mocked as intended.

issues: Faint amber overline 'REAL DIAMONDS. REAL GOLD. EVERY DAY.' has very low contrast against the model photo backdrop — readable but borderline; consider darkening the gold or adding a soft scrim.
Default-credentials helper text is shown in production-like preview ('Default credentials are seeded from backend/.env'); consider hiding behind a debug flag for prod.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid attributes to newsletter form (input + submit) for stable automation — current submit button was not selectable by generic selectors; backend POST /api/newsletter itself works.
(Optional) Add data-testid to checkout form fields, place-order button, add-to-cart, cart-checkout, admin login submit for more deterministic future tests.
(Optional) Hide 'Default credentials are seeded from backend/.env' helper on /admin/login behind a NODE_ENV check before going to production.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: bcrypt + JWT auth correctly implemented; admin role enforced via get_current_admin dep; _id excluded in all DB reads — good.
seed_admin() is idempotent and re-hashes when ADMIN_PASSWORD in .env changes — matches playbook expectations.
CORS uses allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' — works for dev/preview but should be restricted to explicit origins for production.
POST /api/orders is correctly mocked (returns razorpay_order_id starting with 'order_mock_', status 'pending_payment') — main agent and frontend both confirm this is intentional placeholder.
All product responses honour VVS clarity / E-F colour / Solid 9ct Gold defaults from Product model — brand promise is enforced at schema level.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeded 19 products + 1 admin user on startup; tests created TEST_-prefixed contact/consultation/newsletter/order rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_cently_backend.py — run with `pytest backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. All 28 cases passing. Razorpay is intentionally mocked: POST /api/orders returns razorpay_order_id='order_mock_*' and frontend redirects to /order-confirmed?id=<order_number>. Cart/wishlist are localStorage on frontend (no API). Admin JWT expires in 12h — stored in localStorage by frontend. Admin sub-routes confirmed: /admin (overview), /admin/orders, /admin/products, /admin/newsletter, /admin/contact, /admin/consultations. No backend or frontend bugs found in this iteration.
